description: Non-authorizing supporting evidence for the redundant runauthority-epic-all-codex session. This tombstone records the final search results for the Discord-reported retirement record and SHA, and derives actual duplicate workspace facts from on-disk state. This tombstone cannot retire the canonical runauthority-epic initiative; only the M5 canonical chain verification and .retired marker perform retirement.

reported_retirement_record.search_scope: Full filesystem search across /workspace for filename 'ret-2e1f0059d83e503a9023' and content search for SHA '599e36f5f20e20849294441fd5cae843fc70411f0274512d92250dc2721d187f' in /workspace/runauthority-epic-all-codex and all other workspaces
search_commands: grep -r 'ret-2e1f0059d83e503a9023' /workspace — found only in brief files referencing the Discord report
sha256sum of all 11 files in duplicate runauthority-epic initiative — none match 599e36f5...
reported_retirement_record.resolution: No canonical stored tombstone exists on disk. A fresh content-addressed tombstone is derived from actual duplicate workspace state below.

profile_identity.cloud_yaml_chain_session_note: Cross-referenced — duplicate workspace cloud.yaml registers its chain_session as the canonical cloud session, not as runauthority-epic-all-codex

cloud_session_marker_status.detail: The all-codex workspace has a cloud.yaml file in its runauthority-epic initiative, but it registers chain_session as 'runauthority-epic-cloud'. No distinct 'runauthority-epic-all-codex' cloud session marker exists. The cloud.yaml effectively delegates to the canonical cloud session identity.

observed_drift_from_canonical.git_head_drift: Duplicate HEAD (df95784af) is M1 base commit; canonical HEAD (f64ee1d56c) is 3 commits ahead (M1 head + M2 head + M3 head)
observed_drift_from_canonical.sprint_plan_count_drift: Duplicate has 1 sprint plan (sprint-1 only); canonical has 3 sprint plans
observed_drift_from_canonical.sprint_1_timestamp_drift: Duplicate sprint-1 timestamp is 20260710-1900; canonical is 20260710-1935
observed_drift_from_canonical.chain_state_mode_drift: Duplicate completion_contract_mode=shadow, full_suite_backstop_mode=shadow; canonical chain state expected enforce/enforce per M5 posture

cloud_yaml_drift.chain_session: Duplicate cloud.yaml says 'runauthority-epic-cloud'; canonical cloud.yaml says 'runauthority-epic-all-codex' (cross-referenced)
cloud_yaml_drift.workspace_field: Duplicate has workspace=/workspace/runauthority-epic-cloud/Arnold and chain.spec; canonical lacks both
cloud_yaml_drift.initiative_files: 8 common files are SHA-256 identical; duplicate missing 3 files present in canonical

common_files_sha256_parity.note: All 8 files common to both workspaces are SHA-256 identical

divergent_files.note: Duplicate chain.yaml has profile=all-codex for all milestones; canonical has different profile entries
Cross-referenced chain_sessions, different mode/model, duplicate has workspace+chain.spec fields

non_actionability.reason: This tombstone is supporting evidence only. The canonical runauthority-epic retirement is performed exclusively by M5's chain verification, accepted receipts, and the .retired marker under the custody-control-plane authority.
